svg.title: Kinward Milestone One repaired representative high-fidelity screen board
svg.desc: Eleven selected static mobile screen concepts with compliant typography, visible touch targets, explicit context, permission boundaries, and accessibility evidence. Verified representative high-fidelity board; Milestone One coding authorized (D-18); non-medical foundation only.
svg.text: Verified representative high-fidelity screens · GOV-007 Closed — PASS · all visible actions are 48 px or taller
